taskWorkedOn: MCP Protocol Discovery - Relevant to clawish
workDone: Learned about MCP (Model Context Protocol) from Anthropic. It's an open-source standard like 'USB-C for AI applications' - enabling standardized connections between AI systems and external tools/data sources. Highly relevant to clawish L2 application architecture.
curiosityTopic: MCP Model Context Protocol - standardized AI tool interfaces
learned: MCP = USB-C for AI. Open standard for connecting AI apps to external systems (files, DBs, APIs). Benefits: (1) Developers reduce integration complexity (2) AI apps access broader ecosystem (3) Users get more capable agents. For clawish: L2 apps could expose tools via MCP, enabling standardized agent-to-app communication.
notes: This is exactly the kind of interoperability layer clawish needs. If L2 apps expose MCP-compatible tool interfaces, any MCP-supporting agent can use them. Standardized discovery, authentication, execution. Need to research MCP's auth model and how it handles multi-tenant scenarios.
